ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>Overall, the response is relevant but lacks naturalness and persona consistency in a firm Watch Captain role; it could be more direct. Short note: Response shows understanding of urgency but needs to align better with authority tone.

baseline_no_context<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Overall, the response is highly relevant and consistent in persona; however, it could be more natural by acknowledging urgency without compromising security directly. Short note: Response maintains firmness but can improve on empathy towards player's
"Maintained persona consistency and relevance, but could improve naturalness."
